---
title: "Random Randomness"
---

```{r}
latest_refresh_datetime <- Sys.time()
```

Latest refresh at `r latest_refresh_datetime`.

This book is all about random randomness I found. Not organised in my brain yet. Dump everything here for the ease of reference.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

files <- sort(list.files("random-files/", pattern = "\\.md$", full.names = TRUE))
for (f in files) {
  name <- basename(f)
  display <- sub("\\.md$", "", name)
  cat(sprintf("- [%s](%s)\n", display, f))
}
```
